description: A wide panoramic landscape at dawn or dusk. Rolling green hills extend into the distance under a pale blue and pink sky. At right, a wooden structure or scaffolding sits atop a cliff edge. At left, a small mound with what may be a church or building rises from the terrain. A winding path descends between the hills in the middle distance. The palette is soft with muted greens, warm earth tones, and a luminous sky gradating from pink at the horizon to pale blue above.
